category.scope_note: LED luminaire and light source compliance comparison for Chinese manufacturers exporting to the Pakistan market (PSQCA conformity, PS/IEC standards, NEECA energy labelling, PTA radio approval).

title.en: China-to-Pakistan LED Luminaire Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国 LED 灯具出口巴基斯坦：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國 LED 燈具出口巴基斯坦：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China LED luminaire documentation (GB / GB/T standards, CCC certification) against Pakistan requirements: PSQCA mandatory conformity assessment and marking for lamps, PS/IEC adopted standards (PS/IEC 60598, 62560, 62471), NEECA energy efficiency labelling, and PTA type approval for wireless/smart luminaires. Pakistan voltage is 230 V, 50 Hz.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国 LED 灯具文件（GB / GB/T 标准、CCC 认证）与巴基斯坦要求的差距对照：PSQCA 对灯具的强制性合格评定与标志、PS/IEC 采标标准（PS/IEC 60598、62560、62471）、NEECA 能效标签，以及无线/智能灯具的 PTA 型号核准。巴基斯坦电网为 230 V、50 Hz。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國 LED 燈具文件（GB / GB/T 標準、CCC 認證）與巴基斯坦要求的差距對照：PSQCA 對燈具的強制性合格評定與標誌、PS/IEC 採標標準（PS/IEC 60598、62560、62471）、NEECA 能效標籤，以及無線/智能燈具的 PTA 型號核准。巴基斯坦電網為 230 V、50 Hz。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity assessment body determination, product safety determination, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current Pakistan law, PSQCA conformity assessment lists, adopted PS/IEC standards, NEECA energy labelling requirements, and PTA type approval obligations with qualified professionals and the in-country importer before shipment or market placement.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定机构认定、产品安全认定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和经销商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格专业人士及在地进口商核验现行巴基斯坦法律、PSQCA 合格评定清单、采标的 PS/IEC 标准、NEECA 能效标签要求及 PTA 型号核准义务。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定機構認定、產品安全認定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和經銷商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格專業人士及在地進口商核驗現行巴基斯坦法律、PSQCA 合格評定清單、採標的 PS/IEC 標準、NEECA 能效標籤要求及 PTA 型號核准義務。

answer_first.en: A Chinese LED luminaire manufacturer exporting to Pakistan should expect to: obtain PSQCA conformity assessment and the PS conformity/quality mark where lamps fall under PSQCA's mandatory list; demonstrate electrical safety to Pakistan-adopted PS/IEC standards (PS/IEC 60598 for luminaires, PS/IEC 62560 for self-ballasted lamps, plus controlgear standards) for 230 V / 50 Hz operation; address photobiological safety via PS/IEC 62471 where required; meet NEECA energy efficiency and labelling requirements where the product is covered; and obtain PTA type approval for any luminaire with embedded wireless (Wi-Fi/Bluetooth) functionality. Pakistan does NOT operate an EU-style horizontal RoHS regime, a REACH SVHC supply-chain notification duty, or an EU-style Ecodesign minimum-efficacy regulation — energy efficiency is handled through NEECA labelling rather than a binding minimum-performance gate. Chinese CCC certification and GB-standard test reports are not automatically recognised; a Pakistan-resident importer is generally required to handle clearance and conformity. Verify the current PSQCA Conformity Assessment list, NEECA scope, and PTA requirements with the importer before shipment.
answer_first.zh: 出口巴基斯坦的中国 LED 灯具制造商通常应预期：在灯具属于 PSQCA 强制清单时取得 PSQCA 合格评定及 PS 合格/质量标志；按巴基斯坦采标的 PS/IEC 标准（灯具 PS/IEC 60598、自镇流灯 PS/IEC 62560，及控制装置标准）针对 230 V / 50 Hz 运行证明电气安全；在需要时通过 PS/IEC 62471 处理光生物安全；在产品被涵盖时满足 NEECA 能效及标签要求；并对任何嵌入无线（Wi-Fi/蓝牙）功能的灯具取得 PTA 型号核准。巴基斯坦并未实施欧盟式横向 RoHS 制度、REACH SVHC 供应链通报义务或欧盟式生态设计最低能效法规——能效通过 NEECA 标签而非约束性最低性能门槛处理。中国 CCC 认证及 GB 标准检测报告不被自动认可；通常须由巴基斯坦本地进口商办理清关及合格评定。出货前请与进口商核实现行 PSQCA 合格评定清单、NEECA 适用范围及 PTA 要求。
answer_first.zht: 出口巴基斯坦的中國 LED 燈具製造商通常應預期：在燈具屬於 PSQCA 強制清單時取得 PSQCA 合格評定及 PS 合格/質量標誌；按巴基斯坦採標的 PS/IEC 標準（燈具 PS/IEC 60598、自鎮流燈 PS/IEC 62560，及控制裝置標準）針對 230 V / 50 Hz 運行證明電氣安全；在需要時通過 PS/IEC 62471 處理光生物安全；在產品被涵蓋時滿足 NEECA 能效及標籤要求；並對任何嵌入無線（Wi-Fi/藍牙）功能的燈具取得 PTA 型號核准。巴基斯坦並未實施歐盟式橫向 RoHS 制度、REACH SVHC 供應鏈通報義務或歐盟式生態設計最低能效法規——能效通過 NEECA 標籤而非約束性最低性能門檻處理。中國 CCC 認證及 GB 標準檢測報告不被自動認可；通常須由巴基斯坦本地進口商辦理清關及合格評定。出貨前請與進口商核實現行 PSQCA 合格評定清單、NEECA 適用範圍及 PTA 要求。

editorial_controls.review_cycle: Re-verify on each PSQCA Conformity Assessment list update, NEECA labelling scope change, and PTA regulation change; minimum semi-annual review.
editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be true. PSQCA mandatory-item scope, NEECA coverage, and PTA type-approval triggers must be re-verified against current official sources on each review cycle.
